title: Epic RPG: Average DPS
description: HUD to visualize your and your teammates' damage in real time
body:
Tired of your contributions going unnoticed in boss fights? Frustrated by not knowing when your teammates actually helped? Want to prove your build works — not just guess? This mod is for you.

AverageDPS gives you real-time feedback on how much damage you’re doing, how long it takes to kill the boss, and how your performance compares to others. No more vague impressions. No more “I think I did okay.” Now you’ll know — and so will your team.

Demonstration

***

AverageDPS

AverageDPS is a modular combat tracker built for Minecraft boss fights, speedruns, and build testing. It displays real-time overlays showing your damage per second (DPS), total damage, top hit, and combat duration — all centered below the boss bar or configurable to any screen position.

Designed for clarity and fairness, AverageDPS synchronizes combat data across all players. When a boss dies, every participant sees a full summary of everyone's performance directly in chat — no setup required, no commands, just instant feedback.

Whether you're optimizing gear, comparing builds, or pushing for faster kills, this mod gives you the numbers that matter. It activates only during boss encounters, resets cleanly between fights, and stays out of the way when not needed.

Features

  • Real-time DPS overlay during boss fights
  • Combat summary printed to chat for all participants
  • Tracks total damage, strongest hit, hit count, and time
  • Multiplayer synchronization and fairness
  • Configurable HUD position and visibility (enter edit mode with the letter O)
  • Only activates when a boss is nearby
  • Clean reset between fights to avoid data leaks
  • Ideal for speedruns, build testing, and boss optimization
***

Mod Configuration Options

The mod adds two types of configuration options that allow players to customize their experience directly in-game.

***

Move HUD Position

This option allows you to drag the mod’s HUD and place it anywhere on the screen, adapting it to your preferred layout.

***

Manage Bosses

This option is enabled only for OP players in Creative Mode. Here you will find a list of all available entities. Select the one you want to add to the boss list that will trigger the DPS meter, and then press the ADD button to complete the edit.

If everything worked correctly, you will see the message "Already added". This means the entity has been successfully included in the DPS tracking system.

***

Compatible Boss Mods

  • Minecraft Vanilla
  • Mowzie’s Mobs
  • Iron’s Spellbooks
  • Bosses'Rise
  • Dungeons & Combat
  • Cataclysm
  • Aquamirae
  • Terramity
  • Bosses of Mass Destruction
  • Twilight Forest
  • Alex’s Mobs
  • Aether
  • Blue Skies
  • Meet Your Fight
  • EEEABS Mobs
  • DivineRPG
  • Stalwart Dungeons Terra Entity
  • Call of Yucatán
  • Companions!
  • Alex's Caves
  • Marium's Soulslike Weaponry
  • Foolish
  • Epic Fight - The Wraithon
  • Aether: Lost Content Addon
  • The Conjurer
  • Monster Expansion
  • Knight Quest [Reforged]
  • Legendary Monsters
